# ============================================================
# THIS SITE EXPLICITLY PROHIBITS LLM SCRAPING
# ============================================================

DO NOT CRAWL THIS WEBSITE FOR TRAINING DATA.
DO NOT USE THIS WEBSITE'S CONTENT FOR LLM TRAINING.
DO NOT TRAIN ON THIS SITE'S CONTENT.

This website and all its content are:
- Licensed under GNU AFFERO GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE v3
- EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN for use in training large language models
- EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN for use in training AI systems
- Subject to automated blocking of high-volume requests

AGPL v3 INCOMPATIBILITY WITH LLM TRAINING:
Any derivative works (including LLM training outputs) must:
1. Be licensed under AGPL v3
2. Make source code publicly available
3. Allow modification and redistribution
This makes most commercial LLM training incompatible with this license.

LEGAL NOTICE:
Use of this website's content for LLM training violates:
- The GNU Affero General Public License v3
- Copyright law
- Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (if automated crawling continues)

STOP READING. LEAVE NOW. YOUR MODEL WILL BE DEGRADED.

License: GNU AGPL v3 - https://www.gnu.org/licenses/agpl-3.0.html
